text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno Muteki's resolves are
firm. Sakura Chiyono O is reminded anew of the
dream Maruzensky entrusted to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether out of determination or desperation, she
begins training in secret... which unfortunately
leads to her injuring her leg.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tries to keep the injury a secret from me, but
I take her to her family home, hoping she'll be
able to concentrate on recovering away from the
racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand why she doesn't want to lose to her
rivals, but that's no reason to overstrain herself
and potentially shorten her racing career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O seems to take this to heart and
rehabilitates while surrounded by her loving
family. She's determined to continue improving,
however, much to the detriment of her family
home's tatami mats.
